title: Farage’s Resignation Risks Becoming Farce as U.K. Parties Boycott Clacton By-Election
summary_full: Under investigation over an undisclosed gift, the right-wing leader Nigel Farage may end up in a special election against a candidate dressed as a trash can.
summary_public: Under investigation over an undisclosed gift, the right-wing leader Nigel Farage may end up in a special election against a candidate dressed as a trash can.
